---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea or new hardware interface for this project
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''

---

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is (e.g. "I want to get a push notification when a student scans their card, but currently there is only email/web database updates...").

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen. Mention any additional library dependencies or hardware wiring required.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Additional Context**
Add any other context, diagrams, or links about the feature request here.
